regions.text: What is the work of the eyes? Seeing. Their work is seeing. What is the work of the ears? Hearing. Their work is hearing.
What is the work of the legs? Walking. Walking is their chief work. What is the work of the mouth?
Is talking or taking in food the chief work of the mouth? I say this. This is talk.
What is the work of the hands? Taking things up, putting them down, getting things, giving things, making things. We do things with our hands.
